🔠 Concordance

Every significant English word in the translation so far, with every verse it appears in — 4395 words, 30986 occurrences, generated automatically from the translation text itself each time a chapter is added (common function words are skipped). Because it indexes THIS translation, it reflects this project's actual renderings: look up vault, not firmament.

The MisterLibrarian Bible Project — a fresh translation of the Bible into modern English, made from the original Hebrew and Greek (the Masoretic Text and the critical Greek text) one chapter at a time, with translator's notes comparing every choice against seven landmark versions. Kept by Mr. Librarian; translated with Claude.
